components.text:
Employee Onboarding Checklist

Complete the details below to initiate the onboarding workflow for the new hire.

components.label: Employee Name
components.placeholder: Enter the new hire's full name

components.label: Department
components.placeholder: Enter the department the new hire is joining

components.label: Job Role / Title
components.placeholder: Enter the new hire's job title

components.label: Buddy Assigned
components.placeholder: Enter the name of the assigned buddy

components.label: Additional Notes
components.placeholder: Any special requirements or notes for the onboarding team
